sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01'));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = subtractWeeks(event_date, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, subtractWeeks(event_date, 3) AS new_event_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, subtractWeeks(toDateTime('2024-01-01 12:00:00'), 4) AS adjusted_date_time FROM test_dates;
